## What does this change?

<!-- A short summary, and the issue it closes (e.g. "Closes #12"). -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] No keys, prompts, or household data are logged or persisted
- [ ] Free text is validated (zod) and sanitized (prompt + render) where relevant
- [ ] No new third-party scripts / CDNs; CSP stays strict
- [ ] Motion (if any) respects `prefers-reduced-motion`
- [ ] Followed [ARCHITECTURE.md](../ARCHITECTURE.md) layering and "one LLM call" rule
